GPT-5.4 and Claude did some original analyses, but someone build a harness for Deep Think! https://t.co/QMzmAIfFtL

To clarify: Gemini Deep Think is a really smart model, but it doesn't have access to the same tools as Claude or ChatGPT - it can't download files, cannot consistently run code on its own, cannot produce downloadable files, does not clearly show when it does web search, etc

GPT 5.4 发布，价格又涨了
这让我思考，究竟什么是“价格”？
卖方的定价是基于成本，还是基于竞争？
这些都是表面现象。
一个商品其实卖多少钱都有人买。
它的价格，只需要符合买方的 ROI 就可以了。
买方的预期投入<=价格<=买方的预期收益
等价交换在某个点是可能的
大部分时候是不可能的 https://t.co/h9kT9n15pq

阴谋论是最低级的结构能，因为大部分人只能看懂阴谋论
在这种地方无法诞生高级的智能

My "Isle of Secrets" animation is ready. Enjoy! 

I work at Adobe so used Adobe Firefly platform a lot 

Workflow breakdown in comments 👇

I made it as part of AI animation course I'm taking with @Framer_X  I learnt about multi-shot scenes, sound effects and camera angles https://t.co/UVc7aSKvOr

Step 1: As always I used Adobe Firefly Boards for brainstorming and generating frames. I used both Nano Banana 2 and Flux Context. Sora 2 for video (right there). Topaz Upscaler to upscale Frames https://t.co/nMBruKq4od
Step 2: I used collage method for reference frames right there in Adobe Firefly Boards and used Sora 2 to combine different elements into a video animation https://t.co/OF2AkUFyp2
Step 3: I put together everything in Adobe Express that is connected to Adobe Firefly Boards directly https://t.co/GuFtfr0aoB
Step 4: I used Premiere Pro to flip one of the videos because I needed the character to come from different side of the frame using Horizontal Flip https://t.co/nZdRDGSTgS
Step 5: I used Generate Soundtack based on the final video I had. It's available on Adobe Firefly Website. https://t.co/Wr3c5oXTYg
Step 6: Topaz Upscaler to upscale frames right there in Firefly Boards https://t.co/93urWAtsoM
Step 7: I did use Seedance for certain scenes that Sora 2 didn't handle that well https://t.co/fvWA24xP7V
Step 8: Step 3: I used some of the basic sound effects like sound of the market and ocean from Adobe Express Stock library https://t.co/xeNBE1GmPU
Step 9: I combined sound effects and music track I generated with Adobe Firefly Generate Sound. It was pretty cool together. Mixed sound, so it's a bit more interesting. https://t.co/oqxB56uOCi

For all the prompts and workflow beyond Adobe tools I recommend taking @Framer_X course. He's a good friend of mine and I always want to support his teaching. He's awesome. 
This post isn't sponsored. I'm learning and sharing with you my process.
